exploration_notes: The bug is in django/db/models/sql/compiler.py in the get_select() method (lines ~260-268). When values_list() is used with annotation expressions, klass_info['select_fields'] is computed as a sequential range assuming model columns occupy the first positions in the SELECT clause. However, when self.query.selected is not None, the selected list preserves user-specified field order, so annotations can appear before model columns. This causes select_fields indices to point to annotation expression
